content: We can reframe 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory as a dynamic, curiosity-pruned knowledge reservoir where only memory traces that trigger high intrinsic prediction error (the core signal from ICM) are retained and prioritized for active querying, turning memory efficiency from a technical constraint into an active learning strategy. This creates a self-reinforcing cycle where an agent’s curiosity automatically shapes its working memory footprint to match its ongoing learning goals.
source_topics: Memory-efficient ICM implementation for large-scale autonomous agents
